text: I've been using your service for a few months now and, honestly, it's been a rollercoaster. The quality just doesn't match what was promised in the ads—like, I really expected more after hearing all the hype. Plus, I’ve had to explain my issues over and over again to your support team, which is super frustrating! Can I please get a refund? I don’t think I can keep relying on this level of performance any longer.

I've been trying to log into my account for days now and it just won't let me in. It's really frustrating because I have so much important stuff I need to access. Can someone please help me figure this out?
I’m really confused! I thought I signed up for a month free trial, but now I see a charge on my account. Can someone please explain what's going on?
Could you please clarify whether my subscription is active? I thought I had canceled it, but I still see charges on my bank statement. Thank you for your assistance.
My app won’t load, and I can't find any info on it. What’s going on?
I received my order today, but it was missing the free gift I was promised. That's not what I expected!

Hey, I bought this thing last week and it’s just not working. Can I get my money back? Also, I ordered pizza the same night, so maybe that was a sign that I should've trusted my gut? Anyway, please help!
I can't believe my order took ages to arrive for no good reason. This is just ridiculous!
hey, i tried to use the new feature but it’s not working properly! can u fix this?
I'm really upset right now because I ordered something and it didn't arrive. Can you please help me get my money back? I feel scammed!
I am having troubble accessing my account, the password reset link does not seem to work at all. Could you please assist?
Hey, I was charged for the yearly plan but I only wanted the monthy one. Can you help?
I'm really frustrated right now. My app keeps crashing every time I try to open it! I don’t even know why it’s happening.

I'm having a bit of trouble with the app. It keeps freezing when I try to upload photos, but it worked fine last week. I haven't changed anything, just would like some advice on what to do next. Thanks!
I couldn't believe it when my last order arrived missing items... so frustrating! Not sure what went wrong here.

I am writing to formally express my concern regarding the service provided, particularly in relation to the numerous errors. On several occasions, I have encountered discrepancies that seemed to arise from a lack of proper communication. Furthermore, the response times have left much to be desired, which amplifies the frustration I’m facing as a long-standing customer. It’s disheartening to observe that despite assurances of improvement, my experiences seem to contradict the promises made. I hope this feedback can be taken seriously so that no other customer has to endure the same difficulties.
